name: Cauliflower Tomato and Green Pea Curry
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Fresh or frozen green peas
recipeInstructions:
1. Preparation time: 25 minutes
2. Cooking time: 20 minutes
3. Boil the cauliflower and peas in water until tender. Drain.
4. Cook the onion, garlic, and ginger in the ghee until golden and tender.
5. Add turmeric, coriander, vindaloo paste, sugar, cardamoms, and yogurt to the pan. Cook for 3-4 minutes.
6. Add tomatoes and cook for an additional 3-4 minutes.
7. Stir in the cauliflower florets and peas. Simmer for another 3-4 minutes.
8. Serve hot with rice.
